summary: Architecture apply now returns agent_next so new agent sessions do not have to infer the next step after recording baseline alignment. Aligned apply routes to nori-evidence with the apply record context; needs-challenge routes to nori-architecture-challenge.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'architecture apply command module|architecture apply routes conflicts'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'architecture apply command module|architecture apply routes conflicts'

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'architecture apply records do not count'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'architecture apply records do not count'

reviewability: Run the listed tests and inspect architecture apply JSON for data.agent_next.state evidence_ready_for_recording or architecture_needs_review.
limitations: This verifies deterministic routing after architecture apply; Product AC evidence still needs user-visible verification.
